title: Modinium
description: This pack focuses on automation and making the player insanely over-powered.
body:
This mod focuses on Automation and making the player insanely Over-Powered.

If you enjoy automation using mods like Create, then this pack is for you!

I spent almost exactly 12 hours working on the first verion of this pack, and I'm going to hopefully continue updating it for a very long time.
